expected_deltas.content: Providing 30 days written notice allows either party to terminate the agreement
expected_deltas.source_span: Either party may terminate this agreement by providing 30 days written notice to the other party.

expected_deltas.content: Terminating before the 12-month term ends triggers a 20% early termination fee
expected_deltas.source_span: If the Client terminates before the end of the initial 12-month term, an early termination fee equal to 20% of the remaining contract value applies.
